title: agropyron cristatum subsp. pachyrhizum
intro: Agropyron cristatum subsp. pachyrhizum, also known as the Pachyrhizous crested wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Agropyron cristatum subsp. pachyrhizum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
